candidates.why: Best available non-lease current debt line; captures current maturities of long-term debt and is preferable to lease rows, which must be excluded.

variables.notes: Selected the clean non-lease short-term/current-maturity debt line. Excluded 'Capital Leases Mat. within 1 Year' per rule.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities, but the same label also appears in the asset section, creating ambiguity.

variables.notes: R:nc. Likely current taxes payable, but 'Income tax' appears twice on the same sheet (asset-side and liability-side), so the exact row is ambiguous from the preview alone.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet PPE total/net line; preferred over cash-flow capex/disposal lines and over component lines.
